package.name: arm_teleop
package.description: Singularity-robust real-time servo for the dicerox 6R arm. An SVD selectively-damped differential-IK node (sdls_servo) maps a Cartesian twist to joint motion and publishes the result on /joint_states (which esp32_bridge forwards to the ESP32 as MSG_ARM_JOINTS). Includes keyboard and joystick teleop. No MoveIt / ros2_control dependency.
